content.summary: Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion model. Reads the previous frame from a feedback loop, computes Laplacian diffusion with a 3x3 kernel, and outputs the next simulation step. Produces organic, coral-like patterns that evolve over time.
warnings: Requires a Feedback TOP to create the simulation loop
Initialize the first frame with a seed pattern (e.g., a small rectangle of chemical B) or the simulation will remain blank
uFeedRate and uKillRate are extremely sensitive — small changes produce dramatically different patterns
High GPU cost due to 9 texture lookups per channel per pixel

uniforms.description: Feed rate for chemical A replenishment
uniforms.name: uFeedRate

uniforms.description: Kill rate for chemical B removal
uniforms.name: uKillRate
